For platform & engineering teams

Your agents ran. Your audit trail did not.

A platform that logs every AI action so your team can review it and show clients a clear demo — procurement-friendly.

For platform teams For agencies 48h MVP path

Policy at dispatch — one call, one receipt

POST /v1/decision
→ {"verdict": "BLOCK", "receipt_id": "sa-0886", "signed_at": "…"}
// Live from factory disk · refreshes on deploy

Same spine as sourcea-boot — eval the gate before you buy the build.

Factory · Runtime · Proof

6/6 proof chain complete <5m live replay demo 100% policy at dispatch Full row capability map

Closeout has no receipt

Stakeholders ask "what ran?" and you forward logs. They wanted a signed PASS or BLOCK — something counsel can file.

Policy arrives too late

Governance at session start misses the dangerous action at minute forty. You need a gate on every dispatch.

Automation without accountability

Workflow tools connect steps. They do not prove outcomes, catch tampering, or let you replay yesterday cold.

01

Proven in production

The same governed spine ships to every customer — not a slide-deck promise.

02

Policy before the model

Every action passes your rules on disk before the LLM executes.

03

Receipts your team keeps

Weekly export with what ran, what blocked, and which policy applied — yours on disk.

04

Proof in one sitting

ALLOW, BLOCK, and tamper detection — verifiable in under five minutes on the page.

Before you read another slide deck

How your loop stays governed

Dispatch · Receipt · Replay

Dispatch

Each proposed action checked against your policy — every time.

Sub-millisecond checks

Receipt

ALLOW or BLOCK on disk — Monday starts from evidence, not memory.

Synced with your roster

Replay

Re-run last night without chat history. Tamper shows up immediately.

Demo-ready in minutes
